headline: Prediction: Cisco Stock Will Trade at This Price in 2028
summary: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) just posted record quarterly revenue of $15.84 billion with networking up 25% year over year and AI infrastructure orders of $5.3 billion year to date. The stock has more than doubled, climbing 91.59% over the past year to $118.64. Can CSCO reach $175 by 2028? That is a stretch, but not impossible. ... Prediction: Cisco Stock Will Trade at This Price in 2028

headline: ‘Dinosaur’ Tech Stocks Reborn as AI Fuels $1.7 Trillion Rally
summary: (Bloomberg) -- They were all stars of the dot-com era before fading into the background as the bubble burst and a new generation of tech darlings rose to the forefront. headline: Nvidia CFO Colette Kress: ‘AI is no longer a nice-to-have’
summary: The tech giant sees $3 trillion to $4 trillion in global AI infrastructure spending by the end of the decade.
